finding: All 27 slots retain the expected field names, types, and required-claim IDs apart from the semantic status enum. However, none already satisfies the new unique content-shape contract: most answered-looking slots use an exact empty omission_reason rather than null, while q015 contains claim/reason conflicts. Status removal alone therefore does not make the nine answerable historical payloads valid.
